title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hyundai India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hyundai India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hyundai India Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Ahmedabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hyundai India Ventures Solutions:
Hyundai India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India Ventures Solutions!
